headline: Reality TV Star's 'I'm Leaving The Show' Drama Was Just A Bathroom Break, Producers Are Furious
summary: She walked out dramatically, then walked back in 8 minutes later saying 'sorry, that was just gas.'
fullBody: Tiffany McMelodrama stormed off the set of 'Love at First Lie' after a heated argument, screaming 'I'm done! I'm leaving! You've lost me forever!' Producers panicked, cameras followed her to the parking lot... where she stood awkwardly for 8 minutes before returning. 'I just needed to fart,' Tiffany explained. 'But then I committed to the bit.' The episode will air as 'The Most Dramatic Exit in Reality TV History.' Tiffany has been asked to 'maybe not' next time.
